summary: PR 2211 marks `melee/it/items/itfushigibana.c` as Matching, adjusts two `.sdata2` float symbols from global `it_804DD580/it_804DD584` names to local labels `@154/@155`, and changes the Fushigibana item state table's third state id from `2` to `-1`. It also moves two static helper functions earlier in the source file, likely affecting compile/link ordering for the matching object. Bot output reports linked-code and data progress plus two new data-section matches for the itfushigibana unit.

key_files.role: Item source adjusted for matching/linking: state table value changed and two static helper definitions moved before their callers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/items/itfushigibana.c hunk changes state table entry from 2 to -1
raw_diff: src/melee/it/items/itfushigibana.c moves itFushigibana_UnkMotion1_Anim_inline1 and inline2 from below it_802D718C to above itFushigibana_Logic29_Spawned

key_files.role: Build configuration flips itfushigibana object from NonMatching to Matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py changes Object(NonMatching, "melee/it/items/itfushigibana.c") to Object(Matching, "melee/it/items/itfushigibana.c")

key_files.role: Symbol metadata changes two `.sdata2` floats at 0x804DD580 and 0x804DD584 from global symbols to local labels.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt changes it_804DD580 to @154 at .sdata2:0x804DD580
raw_diff: symbols.txt changes it_804DD584 to @155 at .sdata2:0x804DD584

what_changed.text: `itfushigibana.c` item state table entry for `itFushigibana_UnkMotion2_*` changed its first field from `2` to `-1`.
Two static helpers, `itFushigibana_UnkMotion1_Anim_inline1` and `itFushigibana_UnkMotion1_Anim_inline2`, were moved earlier in the file without body changes in the shown diff.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: helper bodies added above itFushigibana_Logic29_Spawned and removed below it_802D718C

what_changed.text: `config/GALE01/symbols.txt` makes two `.sdata2` floats local labels `@154` and `@155` instead of global `it_804DD580` and `it_804DD584` symbols.

Automation reported linked-code progress of +1024 bytes, matched-data progress of +56 bytes, linked-data progress of +56 bytes, and two new matches for the `main/melee/it/items/itfushigibana` unit: `.sdata2` +4 bytes to 100.00% and `.data` +3 bytes to 100.00%.

smart_moves.text: The PR keeps the source edit narrow: a state-table constant, local helper ordering, object matching status, and two symbol-scope/name metadata changes.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: three changed files, 24 additions and 24 deletions total

smart_moves.text: The symbol changes use local labels for two floats instead of keeping global address-style names, aligning with the idea that section metadata can be part of matching when ownership/scope evidence supports it.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For item object matching, small source-order changes to static helper definitions can be part of matching/linking work; record these as ordering/codegen-sensitive changes rather than semantic rewrites unless body changes are shown.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: helper definitions are moved earlier with identical visible bodies
raw_diff: configure.py flips the object to Matching

decomp_lessons.lesson: Item state table constants can be match-critical; here the `itFushigibana_UnkMotion2_*` entry used `-1` rather than `2` in the matching source.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ItemStateTable third row changes first value from 2 to -1

decomp_lessons.lesson: When matching a translation unit, verify float symbol scope/name metadata as well as C source; local `.sdata2` labels may be needed instead of global address-style symbols.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: 0x804DD580 and 0x804DD584 changed from global `it_...` symbols to local `@154/@155` labels
text_corpus.jsonl: bot reports `.sdata2` match for main/melee/it/items/itfushigibana

naming_conventions.convention: For this PR's matched symbol metadata, two anonymous/local `.sdata2` floats are represented with local labels `@154` and `@155` rather than global `it_804DD580` and `it_804DD584` names.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Flip the object to Matching only after the source and metadata changes needed for the unit are in place.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py changes itfushigibana.c from NonMatching to Matching

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use symbol metadata corrections for local float labels when `.sdata2` ownership/scope affects unit matching.

text_corpus.jsonl: bot reports `main/melee/it/items/itfushigibana` `.sdata2` match from 50.00% to 100.00%

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Move static helper definitions earlier in the file when source order influences compile/link output, while preserving helper bodies.

review_feedback.text: GALE01 report showed linked code +0.03% (+1024 bytes), matched data +56 bytes, linked data +56 bytes, and two new matches for the itfushigibana unit.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Item matching may require static helper ordering plus metadata fixes
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2211, `itfushigibana.c` became a Matching object after narrow edits: moving two static helper definitions earlier, changing one `ItemStateTable` value from `2` to `-1`, and adjusting two `.sdata2` symbols from globals to local labels.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/items/itfushigibana.c helper move and ItemStateTable change

accepted_candidate_records.title: Local `.sdata2` labels can be part of unit matching
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2211 changed `.sdata2` floats at `0x804DD580` and `0x804DD584` from global `it_804DD580/it_804DD584` symbols to local labels `@154/@155`, and the bot report listed a new `.sdata2` match for the itfushigibana unit.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that helper movement is a general style requirement; this PR only shows it was part of this matching change.
Do not claim exact function-level text matches from this slice; the loaded bot report names linked-code progress and data-section matches, not individual matched functions.
Do not infer reviewer approval rationale; no review comments or human issue comments are loaded.
Do not promote `-1` as a universal ItemStateTable convention; evidence only supports this itfushigibana entry.
